request: 把一份有来源的行业研究做成视频 brief
_example_purpose: Self-test sample that demonstrates the Codex adapter runtime truthfully reporting a non-recovery scenario.
It is NOT a verified_partial evidence sample. No source-acquisition and no post-dispatch hook ran in this run.

The dispatch_decision, dispatch_log.invocation, and dispatch_log.recovery fields are mutually consistent: target is null, source_result is null, provider_invoked is false, sources_recovered is false, result_recovered is false.

boundaries: Codex natural-language orchestrator is a minimal adapter runtime.
It does not claim true independent multi-agent execution.
Policy provider selection is distinct from the minimal runtime provider actually invoked.
Provider dispatch is determined by local policy configuration, not hardcoded in think-tank core.
Downstream provider handoff is the responsibility of local .think-tank/ configuration.

skill_route.selection_reason: Selected by routing policy preference and capability match.

boundaries: Policy route selection does not invoke any provider.
Selected provider must still pass dispatch-policy and result-recovery before it can be verified.

notes: Preflight only proves the local skill and runtime dependency are visible.
Real render verification requires dispatch, output file checks, and recovery.

preflight ready status does NOT auto-promote this sample to verified_partial; the orchestrator only runs the hook when a post_dispatch config is present, and this policy has no post_dispatch on media-production-handoff.
boundaries: Preflight checks prerequisites only; it does not invoke the provider.
A ready status does not prove end-to-end result recovery.

dispatch_record.boundary: Provider dispatch is determined by local .think-tank/ policy configuration; this run had no target and no post_dispatch hook, so no provider was actually invoked.

dispatch_decision.task: 把一份有来源的行业研究做成视频 brief
dispatch_decision.selection_reason: Selected by routing policy preference and capability match.

boundaries: Provider dispatch is determined by local .think-tank/ policy configuration.
think-tank core does not hardcode downstream skill names, paths, or internals.
For provider-specific handoff, configure a post-dispatch hook in local policy.

final_output.request: 把一份有来源的行业研究做成视频 brief
final_output.conclusion: Request routed to research-to-video without provider invocation; no source-acquisition and no post-dispatch hook ran in this run.
recommendations: Provide a target via --target to enable minimal source-acquisition.
Configure a post_dispatch block in .think-tank/provider-policy.yaml to enable provider-specific handoff.
Do not mark this sample as verified_partial; evidence_state is 'selected', not 'verified_partial'.

boundaries: This sample is a self-test of truthful no-recovery reporting, not a verified_partial provider evidence sample.
evidence_state is 'selected', which is the correct label for a route that matched but did not invoke any provider.

To produce a real verified_partial sample, configure both a target with a read-capable source and a post_dispatch hook in .think-tank/provider-policy.yaml; the orchestrator will then run source-acquisition and the hook (subject to preflight gates) and the result will be genuinely recovered.
